resources:
Emergency Responder Hello blank fragment
Continue
Crash Detection Drive Smarter, Stay Safer Welcome to your new co-pilot for peace of mind in the road. Let’s get you set up for a safer journey Automatic Crash Detection Using your phone’s sensors, we can detect a potential crash and automatically send for help when you need it most." Notify Your Loved Ones In case of an incident, your pre-selected emergency contacts will be automatically notified with your location. Enable Location to Detect Accidents In case of an incident, your pre-selected emergency contacts will be automatically notified with your location.
Location
Notify
